name: Production-grade Apify Actors
summary: Built production-grade Apify Actors for structured extraction, validation, export workflows, and scalable cloud execution.

name: Streamlit business dashboards
summary: Built Streamlit dashboards that turn collected and processed data into usable business-facing tools with filters, metrics, and exports.

name: Python web scraping systems
summary: Built Python scraping systems using BeautifulSoup and Playwright for both static and dynamic websites, with reliable parsing and structured output delivery.

name: Document and PDF automation
summary: Created automated reporting and document generation workflows that produce structured PDF and export outputs from source data.

name: Data pipeline workflows
summary: Built end-to-end data workflows covering collection, cleaning, normalization, validation, and export to business-ready formats like CSV, JSON, and XLSX.
